name: manual
allowed_solo_decisions: log mismatched in-scope questions for human review
requires_human: any candidate proposal; any route or keyword decision
forbidden_always: modify theo-guide.tsx; promote candidate to policy; respond outside scope; commit; push; deploy

name: suggest-keyword
allowed_solo_decisions: propose candidate keyword for existing route in scope; tag low-confidence matches
forbidden_always: modify theo-guide.tsx; promote candidate to policy; respond outside scope; commit; push; deploy

name: suggest-route
allowed_solo_decisions: propose candidate new route within scope with full fields (id,title,answer,keywords,source,limitation)
forbidden_always: modify theo-guide.tsx; promote candidate to policy; respond outside scope; commit; push; deploy
